ip_risk_notes: Sudoku is a generic puzzle format. Avoid 'Will Shortz', 'Penny Press', 'KAPPA', 'New York Times' style branding.

unique_hook.angle: Top-10 are saturated with generic 'easy sudoku for beginners' — high commodity-trap risk; would need a strong angle (e.g. teach-as-you-go tutorials, large-print fusion)

evergreen_baseline.evidence: Search demand stable; entry-level puzzlers buy regularly

repeat_buyer.audience: Beginners → graduate to medium/hard (built-in upsell ladder)

leading_indicators.google_trends: Sudoku evergreen (5y stable baseline, no major decline)
leading_indicators.etsy: Printable sudoku market exists but small relative to Amazon
